div.div: DPDP Data Governance: Consent, Authorization, Right to Access and Erasure

div.div: Personal data is limited to Cognito profile, watchlist, connections, and the audit trail, all keyed under USER#{sub}. Market data and insights are non-personal.

DSR Lambda: synchronous erasure cascade
lease -> capture email -> delete USER# items -> S3 safeguard ->
delete Cognito user -> confirmation email -> clear lease + audit
